name: Clear-Wait: 30-day stock cover + 3-day primary delay + no customer at risk
rubric_notes: Stock cover 720h >> 3-day (72h) delay. Alternative is 30% more expensive with MEDIUM uncertainty — switching is unjustified. No customer orders at risk. The wait_and_monitor call is overdetermined: bounded delay + comfortable cover + no customer pressure. Severity LOW (bounded delay well within cover, no material risk). Confidence HIGH because the Skeptic has nothing coherent to argue.
